models.epic: A top-level grouping from the coverage map. Sections in the left panel are grouped under their parent epic.
models.sectionSuite: One section from the coverage map, with its 4-step authoring state. The left panel lists all section suites; the right panel shows the active one.
models.validationStepInfo: One of the 4 authoring steps (shape-suite, suite-fixtures, author-tests, capture-evidence) within a section suite. Tracks completion status independently.
models.userStory: A behavioral story authored in the author-tests step. Has a Gherkin scenario, priority level, and a flag for screenshot capture.
models.screenshot: A piece of evidence captured by Hermes for a high-priority user story. Stored in evidence/screenshots/; displayed in the capture-evidence accordion step.

relationships: A SectionSuite has many UserStories (via its author-tests step)
A UserStory may have many Screenshots
Screenshots belong to a UserStory and are associated with a SectionSuite

steps.description: Generate realistic seed data tied to oracles.

steps.description: Write Gherkin stories and executable test cases.

steps.description: Screenshot gallery for high-priority stories.

stories.title: Author tests from /shape-suite output
stories.description: As a test engineer, I want to generate Gherkin stories from the shape-suite scope definition so I can review and confirm intended behaviors before authoring.
stories.gherkin:
Feature: Test Authoring from Suite Scope

  Background:
    Given Test Foundation phase is locked
    And a suite scope has been defined for the active section

  @high @captureScreenshot
  Scenario: Generate Gherkin from scope definition
    Given the user is on the author-tests step
    When they trigger story generation
    Then Gherkin scenarios are authored for each behavior in the scope
    And each scenario is tagged with @high, @adversarial, or @edge-case
    And each test case references an oracle fixture

  @adversarial
  Scenario: Scope with no defined behaviors produces an error
    Given the shape-suite step has been skipped
    When the user opens the author-tests step
    Then an empty state is shown with a prompt to complete shape-suite first

stories.title: Select a story to view its Gherkin
stories.description: As a test engineer, I want to click a user story from the list and see its Gherkin rendered in a code viewer so I can review the scenario without opening a file editor.
stories.gherkin:
Feature: Story Selection and Gherkin Preview

  @high @captureScreenshot
  Scenario: Clicking a story renders its Gherkin
    Given the author-tests accordion step is expanded
    And at least one user story is listed
    When the user clicks a story title
    Then the Gherkin for that story is displayed in the preview panel
    And the active story row is highlighted

  @edge-case
  Scenario: Story with no Gherkin yet shows a placeholder
    Given the author-tests step has started but no tests have been written yet
    When the user clicks the story
    Then a placeholder message appears indicating Gherkin is being generated

stories.title: Mark a suite as complete
stories.description: As a test engineer, I want to mark a section suite as complete once all 4 steps are done so it no longer appears as in-progress in the left panel.
stories.gherkin:
Feature: Suite Completion

  @high @captureScreenshot
  Scenario: Mark suite complete from the right panel
    Given all 4 accordion steps show status 'complete'
    When the user clicks 'Mark Complete' in the right panel header
    Then the suite status updates to 'complete' in the left panel
    And a completion timestamp is recorded
    And the next in-progress suite is auto-selected

  @adversarial
  Scenario: Cannot mark complete with unfinished steps
    Given at least one accordion step has status 'not_started'
    When the user opens the actions menu
    Then 'Mark Complete' is disabled with a tooltip explaining why

  @edge-case
  Scenario: Marking the last suite complete triggers a phase-complete banner
    Given all other suites are already complete
    When the user marks this suite complete
    Then a banner appears indicating Section Validation is fully authored
    And Verdict & Reporting becomes accessible

stories.title: Reset a suite to re-author
stories.description: As a test engineer, I want to reset a section suite so I can restart the authoring flow after the section was re-implemented.
stories.gherkin:
Feature: Suite Reset

  @adversarial
  Scenario: Reset clears all step completions
    Given a suite has some steps marked complete
    When the user selects 'Reset' from the actions menu
    And confirms the destructive action in a confirmation dialog
    Then all 4 steps revert to 'not_started'
    And the suite status reverts to 'not_started'
    And all authored stories and fixtures are cleared

  @edge-case
  Scenario: Reset on a complete suite re-opens the suite for authoring
    Given a suite is marked 'complete'
    When the user resets it
    Then it reappears in the left panel without a completion timestamp

stories.title: Filter suites by epic or status
stories.description: As a test engineer, I want to filter the section list by epic or completion status so I can focus on the relevant suites.
stories.gherkin:
Feature: Suite Filtering

  Scenario: Filter by epic narrows the list
    Given the left panel shows sections from all 4 epics
    When the user selects 'Epic 2: Section Validation' from the filter
    Then only sections belonging to that epic are shown
    And the epic group header is still visible

  Scenario: Search by name filters in real time
    Given the search input is focused
    When the user types 'auth'
    Then only sections whose names contain 'auth' are visible

  Scenario: Filtering with no matches shows an empty state
    Given the search returns no results
    Then a message reads 'No suites match your filter'

screenshots.captureStep: Baseline — author-tests accordion open, story list empty
After generation — 5 stories visible, first story highlighted
Story selected — Gherkin preview rendered on right
@adversarial scenario visible with oracle ref in Gherkin
All stories reviewed — step completion indicator updated

After marking — suite status updates to complete in left panel

shapeSuiteContent.scopeDescription: Validate the 4-step Test Authoring section of Section Validation: story generation from suite scope, Gherkin preview, suite completion, suite reset, and suite filtering. All author-tests outputs must reference oracle fixtures. Edge cases include empty scope, no Gherkin yet, and reset of a complete suite.
shapeSuiteContent.coverageNotes: Focus adversarial scenarios on the suite completion guard (cannot mark complete with unfinished steps) and the reset confirmation flow. Screenshot capture required for high-priority stories.
